productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Black Casual Shoes
description: An absolutely cool casual shoe, this pair from numero uno is a great addition to your wardrobe. The all black uppers with green accents in a classic silhouette creates a strong impression. Team this with jeans and t-shirts for great urban style.UpperSynthetic leather upper for durability and comfortPerforated sides for greater breathabilitySynthetic panel overlays for added style and reinforcement Lace-ups for a snug FitCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for added comfortBrand name embossed on the side, behind collar and printed on the tongueMidsoleEVA midsole for better shock absorption and all day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole in diamond patter with small round lugs on the intersecting points for maximum durability and tractionShoe careWipe synthetic leather surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
